benefits.description: Significantly enhanced tanning response — came home more tan after a long weekend with minimal sun exposure than after a month of outdoor landscaping work; darkened much more with only ~1 hour cumulative sun exposure over a few days
Causes erections — spontaneous or on command

side_effects.description: Uneven melanin production / uneven tanning across leg (referenced by another commenter in context of a reaction to MT2)

protocol_notes: Started MT2 a few days before bachelor party. Spent time on a boat mostly under shade while wearing sunscreen. Used on days with yardwork exposure. Protocol start date and duration not specified.
